name: voice-switch-back-to-text
description: After turning voice replies on, the user can switch back to text with phrasings like 'can you talk to me on text?'. Regression: the prefilter previously missed 'on text' / 'in text' / 'text karo' so the OFF toggle never fired. Turning off must clear metadata.voiceReplies and the ack must go out as text, not audio.

turns.user: can you talk to me on text?
